property-disallowed-list.message: Use the logical equivalent (margin/padding-inline-start|end, inset-inline-start|end, border-inline-start|end*) so it mirrors under dir=rtl. margin/padding shorthands are fine — the build plugin makes them logical.

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: Use text-align: start|end so it mirrors under dir=rtl.
